name: fine_tuned_predictor
description: Two capabilities: (1) classifies political statements as True or False using a Gemini model fine-tuned on the project's training split, processing batches in a single tool call — and if the caller supplies ground-truth labels alongside the statements, also returns headline classification metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, f1, confusion matrix); (2) reports on the underlying fine-tuning job — current state, whether the tuned endpoint is ready, and can refresh which endpoint future predictions use.

skills.name: Classify truthfulness (fine-tuned)
skills.description: Returns True/False per statement using the SFT-tuned Gemini endpoint named in FINE_TUNED_MODEL. Statement-only prompt to match the v1 SFT training format. Falls back to the base model with a warning if no tuned endpoint is configured.
examples: Verify with the tuned model: The Earth orbits the Sun.

skills.name: Evaluate predictions against ground truth
skills.description: When ground-truth labels are passed alongside statements, returns accuracy, precision, recall, f1, and a confusion matrix in addition to the predictions.
examples: Verify these with labels [true, false, true] using fine-tuned: ...
Score these tuned predictions against ground truth.

skills.name: Check fine-tuning job status
skills.description: Polls the latest submitted Vertex AI SFT job; on success, auto-updates the FINE_TUNED_MODEL env var so future predictions route to the freshly-trained endpoint without an MCP restart.
examples: What is the status of the latest tuning job?
